subcategory: 3d parallax tilt card with spring animations
use_cases: Interactive product showcase cards with depth effects
Feature highlight sections with 3D mouse-following animations
E-commerce product cards with premium feel
Portfolio or gallery items with engaging hover interactions
Landing page sections that draw attention through motion
ai_summary: A 3D parallax tilt card component featuring smooth spring-based animations that track mouse movement. The card rotates and applies depth effects to inner elements based on cursor position, creating an immersive interactive experience. Uses Framer Motion for physics-based animations with configurable stiffness and damping.
